# Grey-Seal — GitHub Copilot Instructions

> Full conventions: `docs/CONVENTIONS.md`

## Project Context

Grey-seal is an AI assistant / chat service in Go 1.26. ConnectRPC API over PostgreSQL, Ollama LLM, Shrike vector search for RAG, optional Redis cache, go-app WASM frontend.

Module: `github.com/holmes89/grey-seal`

## Services

- **Role** — manages system prompt roles
- **Resource** — manages documents/attachments attached to conversations
- **Conversation** — chat sessions; queries Shrike for context, sends to Ollama

## Domain Package Structure

```
lib/greyseal/<entity>/
  interface.go    # exported interface
  service.go      # *entityService; has var _ check at top
  grpc/service.go # ConnectRPC handler
  mocks/          # generated by mockery — never edit
```

### Compile-time assertion (always present)

```go
var _ ConversationService = (*conversationService)(nil)
```

### Constructor returns interface

```go
func NewConversationService(...) ConversationService
```

## Optional Deps (nil-safe)

```go
// Pass nil when env var absent — services handle nil gracefully
conversationsvc.NewConversationService(convRepo, msgRepo, searcher, roleRepo, llm, resourceCache, logger)
// searcher and resourceCache may be nil
```

## Repository — use squirrel

```go
psql.StatementBuilder.Select("uuid", "title").From("conversations").Where(squirrel.Eq{"uuid": id})
```

## Testing

```go
//go:build integration   // integration test file header

package conversation_test  // unit test package header
```

- Unit: testify/suite, mockery mocks, `zap.NewNop()`
- Integration: dockertest `postgres:16-alpine`, real DB

## Observability

```go
github.com/XSAM/otelsql          // ← correct DB instrumentation package
otelhttp.NewHandler(mux, "grey-seal")  // HTTP wrapping
```

## Do Not

- Edit `lib/schemas/` — generated protobuf
- Write raw SQL — use squirrel builders
- Return concrete types from constructors
- Mock the database in integration tests
- Use `go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/database/sql/otelsql` — does not exist
